name: boltz-compute-mcp-go
description: Codex plugin for Boltz Compute that keeps the current six-skill workflow surface but routes execution through a local Go MCP server instead of direct shell commands.

interface.shortDescription: Run the Boltz Compute workflows through a local Go MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Provides the same six Boltz Compute skills as the CLI plugin, but execution is routed through a local Go MCP server that wraps the newer boltz-api CLI. The goal is to preserve trigger matching and reasoning context while reducing shell approval fatigue and sandbox friction.
defaultPrompt: Screen this compound library against my target protein and rank the hits.
Design peptide, nanobody, or antibody binders for this target epitope.
Check my Boltz jobs, tell me what finished, and recover the results.
